[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021
[TITLE]: After the insurrection at the Capitol came the finger-pointing. Who’s to blame?
[METADATA/INTRO]: Counter: Removing the president now lacks precedent This is an op-ed by Emery McClendon, a member of the Project 21 Black leadership network. He wrote this for InsideSources.com. An opposing view on this topic was also published Thursday....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Protesters refused to stand down, despite pleas from Trump, President-elect Joe Biden and others. A Capitol Police officer and four protesters died; others were arrested or injured. 
 America is deeply divided. This political friction erupted over the disputed claims of a fraudulent and unfair election. The protesters came from a “Stop the Steal” rally held to draw attention to alleged election improprieties and to show support for Trump. 
 After the insurrection came the finger-pointing. Who’s to blame? Should it be attributed to the angry protesters, a biased media, overly partisan lawmakers, the vice president for not intervening, or the president himself for whipping up the protesters?

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021
[TITLE]: Letters: Better vetting needed for US police forces
[METADATA/INTRO]: Letters: Better vetting needed for US police forces Videos of the riot at the US Capitol show both the unbelievable valor of some of the police officers and craven complicity with the rioters by other officers. Obviously, the vetting of...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Letters: Better vetting needed for US police forces 
 Videos of the riot at the US Capitol show both the unbelievable valor of some of the police officers and craven complicity with the rioters by other officers. Obviously, the vetting of these police did not reject applicants who would prove to be unfit for duty. But many police and sheriff’s departments in cities and counties throughout the United States do hire only personnel who will carry out their duties responsibly. 
 This is done with a well-conceived vetting process. A thorough background evaluation is conducted. The Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory and the 16 Personality Factor tests are administered. The candidate is then extensively interviewed with the background information and that from the two personality tests as the basis for that interview. Very few "bad apples" make it through this process.
